summary: Successfully tested Calendar page redesign from 12-month grid to horizontal scrollable occupancy timeline (Airbnb-style). Backend /api/calendar/timeline endpoint working perfectly with segment-based data. Frontend timeline renders correctly with property grouping, booking bars, lead overlays, sticky headers, and navigation controls. All other pages work correctly (regression test passed).

minor_issues.issue: Returns 422 for invalid property_id instead of expected 404
minor_issues.impact: Test expectation mismatch, functionality works correctly

minor_issues.issue: Date validation prevents creating past tenant for moveout testing
minor_issues.impact: Test setup limitation, actual validation is working correctly

passed_tests: Backend: Calendar timeline endpoint returns correct segment data structure
Backend: Timeline endpoint accepts property_id filter parameter
Backend: Timeline endpoint accepts custom date range parameters
Backend: Timeline returns range_start, range_end, today fields
Backend: All existing CRUD endpoints still work (Properties, Units, Tenants, Leads)
Backend: Income, Vacancy, Dashboard endpoints functional
Frontend: Calendar renders as horizontal scrollable timeline (not old grid)
Frontend: Property headers and unit rows grouped correctly
Frontend: Booking bars proportional to dates (green=long-term, blue=Airbnb)
Frontend: Lead overlays with striped pattern on vacant time only
Frontend: Sticky left column with property/unit labels
Frontend: Sticky month header row with month labels
Frontend: Today red marker line visible
Frontend: Property selector dropdown filters properties
Frontend: Scroll buttons (left, right, Today) work
Frontend: Timeline legend shows booking types
Regression: Properties, Tenants, Leads, Income, Vacancy, Notes pages work correctly
